channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eric Bischoff hopes pro wrestling companies put more of an emphasis on this aspect of the sport
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff tells Fox News Digital what companies need to put more of an emphasis on going forward: storytelling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys fall at home again after piece of roof comes down before loss to Texans
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Things were literally falling from the sky even before the Dallas Cowboys lost yet another home game. The roof at AT&T Stadium can be fixed.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Large metal piece falls on AT&T Stadium field before Cowboys-Texans game
item.description: A large piece of metal fell onto the AT&T Stadium turf before the Dallas Cowboys and Houston Texans kicked off on "Monday Night Football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pirates ace Paul Skenes and Yankees pitcher Luis Gil win Rookie of the Year awards
item.description: Hard-throwing Pittsburgh Pirates ace Paul Skenes capped a remarkable season by winning the National League Rookie of the Year Award on Monday, while Luis Gil of the New York Yankees edged Baltimore's Colton Cowser to take the AL honor.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bronny James has a left heel bruise and is listed as doubtful for the Lakers' next game
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James has a bruised left heel, and he is listed as doubtful for the Los Angeles Lakers' next game against the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: PGA Tour approves reduction to 100 players keeping cards off FedEx Cup list
item.description: The PGA Tour policy board approved eligibility changes Monday that eliminate 25 cards through the FedEx Cup in the first reduction of jobs since the all-exempt tour began in 1983. Starting in 2026, only the top 100 in the FedEx Cup are assured full status the following year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers to honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers will honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Josh Allen, Bills hand Chiefs 1st defeat in nearly a year
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills have handed Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs its first loss since Christmas Day 2023, as there is no longer an undefeated team in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mountain West Conference determines there's insufficient evidence in volleyball Title IX complaint
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Mountain West Conference has concluded there was insufficient evidence to determine misconduct between women's volleyball players from the Colorado State and San Jose State programs ahead of a match last month after a coach filed a Title IX complaint alleging the student-ath
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SJSU volleyball captain demands removal of transgender athlete
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- Some San Jose State University women's volleyball players are suing their head coach, their university, and the Division-1 Mountain West Conference for allowing a transgender player to be on the team.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego Gulls to host Military Appreciation Night this Saturday
item.description: Get ready for an exciting evening of hockey, entertainment and heartfelt gratitude this Saturday, Nov. 16, as the San Diego Gulls host their Military Appreciation Night.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Coby White sinks 3 FTs in final seconds, Bulls avoid close call at buzzer to hang on vs. Knicks after blowing 22-point lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It came down to a matter of inches at Madison Square Garden for the Bulls on Wednesday night. This time, it went their way.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White celebrates local students’ completion of financial literacy program
item.description: Financial education at an early age can help young people lower debt and increase savings and credit scores as they mature into adulthood, according to the FDIC.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC
